title: Trigger
description: Task starts via API; agent runs with local or hosted LLM.

title: Execute
description: Tools + memory; confidence and risk scored each step.

title: Decide
description: User approves or rejects via keypad; webhook resumes graph.

title: Ingest
description: Chunk and embed policy docs (synthetic sample data only).

title: Retrieve
description: Hybrid search for rules relevant to each transaction.

title: Reason
description: LLM outputs score summary and cited rule IDs.

title: Review UI
description: Streamlit for officers to browse flagged items.

title: Search
description: SearXNG returns ranked URLs and snippets.

title: Fetch
description: Optional light fetch for top hits (respect robots.txt).

title: Synthesize
description: Local model cites sources in the response.

title: Chat UI
description: Streamlit with history and model picker.
